_comments: A representative mixed batch covering all normalization rules and fallback paths.
Submit to POST /api/v1/geocode to see all strategy values in one response.
Address 01 — plain street address, no unit qualifier
Address 02 — Apt qualifier stripped before lookup
Address 03 — Unit qualifier stripped before lookup
Address 04 — Suite qualifier stripped before lookup
Address 10 — postal-code fallback (bad street, valid postal code)
Address 11 — not found (no results from either search path)
Address 12 — duplicate of Address 01 (cache hit on second occurrence)
